caseName: Keystone Manganese & Iron Co. v. Martin
caseNameFull: Keystone Manganese and Iron Company v. Martin
syllabus: A bill in equity prayed for an injunction restraining the defendant from trespassing on the land of the plaintiff and taking mineral and ore therefrom, and that lie ae.count to the plaintiff for the value of the ore.already taken therefrom. After a hearing on pleadings and proofs, the Circuit Court made a decree granting a perpetual injunction, and ordering an account before a master: Held, that the decree was not final or appealable.
summary:
APPEAL FROM THE CIRCUIT COURT OF THE UNITED STATES FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF ARKANSAS.

In equity. The case is stated in the opinion.
attorneys: Mr. U. M. Rose and Mr. G. B. Rose, for appellant, submitted on their brief., Mr. G. JT. Tillman for appellee. Mr. J. M. Moore filed a brief for same.

citations.caseName: Equitable Life Assurance Soc. of United States v. Pennsylvania
